(Translated by Google)
The Station needs more love
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoeU95cndnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Bien para la carga de combustible. Baño muy chico, Capacidad para dos personas 1 mingitorio 1 inodoro. Falta limpieza. Salon comercial con poca opción de comida. La parrilla que está al lado del ACA carísima. Sólo pregunté precios.

(Translated by Google)
Good for refueling. Very small bathroom, capacity for two people, one urinal, one toilet. Needs cleaning. Convenience store with limited food options. The grill next to the ACA is extremely expensive. I only asked about prices.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoMEtiVWdnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Terrible cola para entrar al baño  pero el encargado nos abrió el baño del personal, un genio!!!

(Translated by Google)
There was a terrible queue to get into the bathroom, but the manager opened the staff bathroom for us – a genius!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoa0lfbThBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Nunca tienen cigarrillos. Los sandwiches una miseria y no tienen mayonesa para dar

(Translated by Google)
They never have cigarettes. The sandwiches are pathetic, and they don't have any mayonnaise to give away.

reviewReply.comment:
Sra Dana
Agradecemos su calificación. Nos interesaría saber cuales fueron los detalles que hicieron que no lográsemos la mayor puntuación, ya que de esta manera nos ayuda a mejorar.
